session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8795 implementation complete. PR submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8795
## Summary of Changes
**`src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py`:** - Added `import concurrent.futures` - Created `extract_diff_and_fetch_plan_context()` — runs both steps concurrently via `ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2)`, with `skip_description` short-circuit and proper error propagation - Removed individual `click.echo` phase headers from `extract_diff` and `fetch_plan_context` (the combined step prints a single "Phase 2: Getting diff and plan context") - Updated `_submit_pipeline()` to use the combined step instead of the two sequential steps - Renumbered phases: 2 (combined), 3 (generate), 4 (graphite), 5 (finalize)
**`tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_extract_diff_and_fetch_plan_context.py`** (new): - 4 tests: skip_description short-circuit, both outputs populated, diff error propagation, plan error propagation
**`tests/commands/pr/test_submit.py`:** - Updated 3 integration tests to match new phase naming ("Phase 2: Getting diff and plan context")
All 5,909 tests pass across all packages.
